title: Dropdown Menu - restrict adding new labels
excerpt: I needed a multi-select column - which is why I used dropdowns. However, we want to establish a set list and not have all users adding new labels. I would like to be able to restrict who can edit the column labels. I do …

posts.author: wmckethan (Wendy M)
posts.cookedHtml: I needed a multi-select column - which is why I used dropdowns. However, we want to establish a set list and not have all users adding new labels. I would like to be able to restrict who can edit the column labels. I do not want to restrict the entire column editing.
